data.current_description: Generate a response from a specified InternLM model given a list of messages. Compatible with OpenAI chat completions API format.
data.description_suggestion: Generates a chat completion response from a specified InternLM model given a list of messages. Accepts a ChatCompletionRequest containing the model ID, message history, and optional parameters (temperature, max_tokens, etc.). Returns a ChatCompletionResponse with the generated message, usage statistics, and completion metadata. Compatible with OpenAI chat completions API format. Requires bearer token authentication.
